reply_original: Hi there! I completely understand your frustration. Maintaining a high-quality AI with smart responses involves very high server costs. We are working hard to find a balance and offer more ways to earn free messages in the future. If you have specific suggestions, please email us at support@fantachat.ai. Thank you for your patience!
reply_zh: 你好！我完全理解你的沮丧。维持一个拥有智能响应的高质量 AI 涉及非常高的服务器成本。我们正在努力寻找平衡，并在未来提供更多赚取免费消息的方式。如果你有具体的建议，请发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai。感谢你的耐心！
